chip_chandler_intro.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_intro.text: Welcome to The Mandalay Bay! I'm Chip Chandler, guest services. Walk north to the casino floor — our pit crew rotates between tables all night.

chip_chandler_tips.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_tips.text: Your chip balance carries everywhere on the floor. Press P for your MGM Rewards phone — comps ping in as you play. Talk to NPCs with E or Enter. Betty runs the lobby bar west side; Paula handles the Racing Pavilion northeast. Good luck — the house is patient.

chip_chandler_room.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_room.text: Take the gold elevator east of the lobby — hotel tower, front desk Carmen, your room door. Or talk to Carmen after you warp up.

chip_chandler_secret.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_secret.text: Between us? The gold carpet tiles near the plants sometimes hide stories. Also — Tina by the slot aisle saw something weird last night. And Steve Harvey might be calling races at the Pavilion. Survey says… be careful.

chip_chandler_dealers.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_dealers.text: Meryl Screech, Judi Bench, Jennifer Lawless — the whole charismatic crew shuffles between blackjack, poker, and roulette. Check the pit labels when you walk up. Steve Harvey handles roulette and the Pavilion when he's not hosting imaginary game shows.

chip_chandler_bye.speaker: Chip Chandler
chip_chandler_bye.text: Enjoy your stay. Press E anytime you see the golden arrow!

steve_harvey_greet.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_greet.text: Welcome to Table 9! I'm Steve Harvey — yes, THAT Steve Harvey — and this wheel does not play. Minimum ten chips. Survey says… that's a bargain.

choices.label: Any advice from your comedy days?

steve_harvey_return.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_return.text: Back again? Survey says… the wheel missed you. Paula at the Pavilion has race cards if you want action without the spin.

steve_harvey_watch.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_watch.text: Smart. Watch the wheel, learn the rhythm. Come back when you're ready — I'll be here or calling races. The house is patient. I'm not. In stand-up I said you gotta jump — same at this table.

steve_harvey_pavilion.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_pavilion.text: Northeast corner — Pavilion Paula runs the window. When I'm on duty there, Survey says… bet the long shot. When I'm not, still bet the long shot. Entertainment! And down the stretch they come!

steve_harvey_comedy.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_comedy.text: Before the suits and the surveys, I was on stage talking about marriage, money, and mustard. Same lessons apply: don't bet the rent, don't marry someone who hates casinos, and never argue with a roulette wheel.

steve_harvey_feud.speaker: Steve Harvey
steve_harvey_feud.text: Name something you shout when you win big. Survey says… 'OH NO!' because half of Vegas wins loud and loses quiet. Top answer: 'I CAN'T BELIEVE IT!' Second answer: 'I CAN BELIEVE IT — I NEED A DRINK.'

meryl_screech_greet.speaker: Dealer Meryl Screech
meryl_screech_greet.text: Evening. Table 7 is open — six decks, H17, 3:2 blackjack. Minimum ten chips. The felt remembers every hand.

meryl_screech_return.speaker: Dealer Meryl Screech
meryl_screech_return.text: Back for another round? The shoe doesn't judge. Neither do I — theatrically.

meryl_screech_watch.speaker: Dealer Meryl Screech
meryl_screech_watch.text: Smart. The felt remembers every hand. Come back when you're ready — I'll be here.

judi_bench_greet.speaker: Croupier Judi Bench
judi_bench_greet.text: Good evening. Texas Hold'em — full streets, AI opponents, minimum buy-in ten chips. Bond. James Bond. Blinds.

judi_bench_tips.speaker: Croupier Judi Bench
judi_bench_tips.text: Patience beats bravado. Watch three hands before you commit your stack. And never confuse confidence with a pair of threes.

judi_bench_watch.speaker: Croupier Judi Bench
judi_bench_watch.text: Observe the table. Knowledge is the best tell.

jennifer_lawless_greet.speaker: Jennifer Lawless
jennifer_lawless_greet.text: Hey! Table's open — blackjack or Hold'em depending on the night. I promise I won't trip over your chips. Probably.

jennifer_lawless_return.speaker: Jennifer Lawless
jennifer_lawless_return.text: Back for more? I didn't trip once since you left. Personal best.

jennifer_lawless_watch.speaker: Jennifer Lawless
jennifer_lawless_watch.text: No rush. I tripped once standing still. Take your time.

sofia_volume_greet.speaker: Sofia Volume
sofia_volume_greet.text: Dale, amigo! The wheel is HOT tonight! European single-zero, minimum five chips. Place your bets, cariño!

sofia_volume_return.speaker: Sofia Volume
sofia_volume_return.text: You're back! The wheel missed you! Dale!

sofia_volume_tips.speaker: Sofia Volume
sofia_volume_tips.text: Red or black — simple, dramatic, like my cousin's wedding! Dale! But never bet rent, cariño.

sofia_volume_watch.speaker: Sofia Volume
sofia_volume_watch.text: Watch the wheel, feel the energy! It's electric!

octavia_spectacular_greet.speaker: Octavia Spectacular
octavia_spectacular_greet.text: Evening, honey. Pull up a chair — blackjack's my stage tonight. Minimum ten chips, maximum hospitality.

octavia_spectacular_return.speaker: Octavia Spectacular
octavia_spectacular_return.text: Welcome back, sugar. The cards missed you. Honey, the house always wins — but you look good trying.

octavia_spectacular_watch.speaker: Octavia Spectacular
octavia_spectacular_watch.text: Smart to watch first, sugar. I respect that.

nicole_widechart_greet.speaker: Nicole Widechart
nicole_widechart_greet.text: Evening. The table is set. High-limit energy, standard minimums. The chips are whispering. I'm listening.

nicole_widechart_return.speaker: Nicole Widechart
nicole_widechart_return.text: You've returned. Composure suits you. The table awaits.

barkeep_betty_greet.speaker: Barkeep Betty
barkeep_betty_greet.text: What'll it be? Betty's Bar — west lobby, best carpet views on the floor. Cash drinks or MGM Rewards comps.

barkeep_betty_redeem_drink.speaker: Barkeep Betty
barkeep_betty_redeem_drink.text: One comp cocktail on the house — MGM Rewards sent you, didn't they? On the rocks, neon cherry, zero shame.

barkeep_betty_dealers.speaker: Barkeep Betty
barkeep_betty_dealers.text: The pit crew rotates — Meryl on blackjack, Judi on poker, Sofia on roulette when Steve's at the Pavilion. Check the name floating above the felt. I pour faster than they shuffle.

barkeep_betty_gossip.speaker: Barkeep Betty
barkeep_betty_gossip.text: Tina swears she saw a secret behind the north wall tiles. Paula says Steve Harvey called a photo finish last week. Survey says… Tina needs water.

barkeep_betty_bye.speaker: Barkeep Betty
barkeep_betty_bye.text: Come back when you need a break from the felt. Betty's always open.

pavilion_paula_greet.speaker: Pavilion Paula
pavilion_paula_greet.text: Welcome to the Racing Pavilion! Win, place, show — thoroughbred action on simulated Mandalay tracks.

pavilion_paula_steve.speaker: Pavilion Paula
pavilion_paula_steve.text: When Steve's on duty, you'll hear him before you see him. 'Royal Flush in the stretch!' and 'Survey says… bet the long shot!' He rotates in from roulette. The man loves a long shot — says it beats Family Feud applause every time.

pavilion_paula_tips.speaker: Pavilion Paula
pavilion_paula_tips.text: Favorites pay less but win more. Long shots like 'Neon Star' make for better stories. Never bet the rent — that's what Tina said, anyway.

arena_alex_greet.speaker: Arena Alex
arena_alex_greet.text: Welcome to the Equestrian Arena — Dressage and Show Jumping. No flat racing here.

arena_alex_explain.speaker: Arena Alex
arena_alex_explain.text: Dressage is pure precision — rider and horse performing a choreographed test scored by judges. Show Jumping is about clear rounds: knock a fence down, collect faults. Fewest faults wins; ties go to time.

arena_alex_tips.speaker: Arena Alex
arena_alex_tips.text: In Dressage, the combined Technical and Artistic scores guide the odds. In Jumping, a high-ability pair might still knock a fence — check the 'Clear Round' bet for upside on a consistent horse.

arena_alex_bye.speaker: Arena Alex
arena_alex_bye.text: Racing Pavilion is northeast — flat racing stays there. Good luck in the ring!

tourist_tina.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina.text: I came for the wave pool but ended up at the blackjack pit. Vegas, right? Betty's bar has better stories than the slots.

tourist_tina_first.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina_first.text: Third! I heard there's a secret behind the north wall tiles. Probably nonsense. Probably.

tourist_tina_dealers.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina_dealers.text: There's like seven of them? Meryl, Steve, Sofia — they swap tables. I waved at Nicole Widechart and she looked through me. Chills.

tourist_tina_bye.speaker: Tourist Tina
tourist_tina_bye.text: If you find the shark aquarium, tell me — I got lost twice already!

clerk_carmen_greet.speaker: Clerk Carmen
clerk_carmen_greet.text: Welcome to the hotel tower. Reservation on file? Front desk can upgrade, explore the hallway, or checkout.

clerk_carmen_room.speaker: Clerk Carmen
clerk_carmen_room.text: North end of the hallway — your room door. Or open front desk services for upgrades.

clerk_carmen_bye.speaker: Clerk Carmen
clerk_carmen_bye.text: Elevator down returns you to the casino lobby.

hotel_room_door.speaker: Room Door
hotel_room_door.text: Room key works on the third try. Want the full stay menu?

hotel_room_door_bye.speaker: Room Door
hotel_room_door_bye.text: The bay glitters below. Bad decisions await inside.

lifeguard_lou_greet.speaker: Lifeguard Lou
lifeguard_lou_greet.text: Eleven acres of chlorinated ambition. Wave pool's center stage — timing matters.

lifeguard_lou_bye.speaker: Lifeguard Lou
lifeguard_lou_bye.text: Shark Reef is northwest — photograph five species for the Trainer Card. Walk south when you're pruned.

shark_reef_guide_greet.speaker: Reef Guide
shark_reef_guide_greet.text: Sand tiger sharks circle the acrylic. Step through to Shark Reef and photograph five species.

shark_reef_guide_bye.speaker: Reef Guide
shark_reef_guide_bye.text: Warp tile northwest of me. The shark has seen worse nights than yours.

beach_dj_greet.speaker: Beach DJ
beach_dj_greet.text: Neon after dark — glow sticks, bass drops, wave pool lit like a fever dream.

beach_dj_bye.speaker: Beach DJ
beach_dj_bye.text: Rave til dawn. Survey says… dance.

spinster_sal_greet.speaker: Spinster Sal
spinster_sal_greet.text: Mandalay Fortune — three reels, classic cherries, progressive whispers. Don't tell my niece I'm still here.

spinster_sal_high.speaker: Spinster Sal
spinster_sal_high.text: High Limit salon is north — Host will seat you if your stack is loud enough.

spinster_sal_bye.speaker: Spinster Sal
spinster_sal_bye.text: The reels remember kindness. And quarters.

bookie_blake_greet.speaker: Bookie Blake
bookie_blake_greet.text: Lines are live. Moneyline, settle when you're brave. No juice jokes — the juice is the point.

bookie_blake_lock.speaker: Bookie Blake
bookie_blake_lock.text: Lock of the week is whatever you convince yourself after two Betty cocktails.

cashier_carmen_greet.speaker: Cashier Carmen
cashier_carmen_greet.text: Chip window. Buy-in only — play money, real vibes. Convention guests get a little extra.

cashier_carmen_bye.speaker: Cashier Carmen
cashier_carmen_bye.text: Come back when the wallet feels light.

security_sam_greet.speaker: Security Sam
security_sam_greet.text: STAFF ONLY means staff only. Unless Chip whispered about the north wall. Then… I saw nothing.

choices.label: I heard about a back room

security_sam_escort.speaker: Security Sam
security_sam_escort.text: Fine. Walk the north carpet. If you 'accidentally' find the corridor, I escorted you for safety. Comedy gold.

security_sam_bye.speaker: Security Sam
security_sam_bye.text: Keep your hands visible. And your chips.

high_limit_host_greet.speaker: High Limit Host
high_limit_host_greet.text: Salon seating. High Roller machines. Stack required — or High Roller archetype at five grand.

high_limit_host_bye.speaker: High Limit Host
high_limit_host_bye.text: Foundation Room is further north when your balance sings.

shop_clerk_greet.speaker: Shop Clerk
shop_clerk_greet.text: The Shoppes at Mandalay Place — flagship row opens onto the carpet.

shop_clerk_bye.speaker: Shop Clerk
shop_clerk_bye.text: Bags are free. Regret is not.

lobby_statue.speaker: Golden Statue
lobby_statue.text: A polished lion. Its eyes track the carpet. Rumor: Up Up Down Down Left Right Left Right B A.

lobby_statue_pat.speaker: Golden Statue
lobby_statue_pat.text: Warm metal. Somewhere a slot pays a cherry. Coincidence?

reef_docent_greet.speaker: Reef Docent
reef_docent_greet.text: Five species. One camera. Trainer Card waits.

reef_docent_bye.speaker: Reef Docent
reef_docent_bye.text: Don't tap the glass. The sawfish remembers.

hob_stage_greet.speaker: Stage Manager
hob_stage_greet.text: House of Blues — match the beat. Kick, snare, hat. Encore pays chips.

arena_usher_greet.speaker: Arena Usher
arena_usher_greet.text: Michelob ULTRA Arena. Tonight's card: imaginary headliners, real applause tracks.

arena_usher_show.speaker: Arena Usher
arena_usher_show.text: Lights. Fog. A comedian who looks suspiciously like Steve Harvey. Survey says… standing O.

whale_whitney_greet.speaker: Whale Whitney
whale_whitney_greet.text: Foundation Room. We don't chase comps. Comps chase us.

whale_whitney_bye.speaker: Whale Whitney
whale_whitney_bye.text: Warren has the High Roller cabinet if your stack still breathes.

whale_warren_greet.speaker: Whale Warren
whale_warren_greet.text: High Roller cabinet. Same reels. Louder bets.

whale_warren_bye.speaker: Whale Warren
whale_warren_bye.text: Whales don't hurry. The house does.

janitor_joe_greet.speaker: Janitor Joe
janitor_joe_greet.text: You found the STAFF ONLY corridor. Congrats. There's a mop and a rumor about cherry reels.

janitor_joe_secret.speaker: Janitor Joe
janitor_joe_secret.text: Thirty secrets on this property. You've got a few. The statue knows the rest.

janitor_joe_bye.speaker: Janitor Joe
janitor_joe_bye.text: South door dumps you back on the floor. Wipe your feet.
